allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Update coordinator and mobile signer service integrations

- Update coordinator package dependencies
- Refactor WebhookService for improved reliability
- Update signing routes with enhanced error handling
- Improve CoordinatorAPI service in mobile signer
- Minor server configuration updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\ncrim\\Documents\\GitHub\\SecondSetCombo-Wapp-Signer\\secondset-mobile-signer" add coordinator/src/routes/signing.routes.ts coordinator/src/server.ts mobile-signer/App.tsx mobile-signer/package-lock.json mobile-signer/package.json mobile-signer/src/screens/CeremonyProgressScreen.tsx mobile-signer/src/screens/JoinCeremonyScreen.tsx mobile-signer/src/services/CoordinatorAPI.ts mobile-signer/src/services/DeviceInfo.ts mobile-signer/src/services/TSS/KeygenClient.ts mobile-signer/src/services/TSS/TSSCrypto.ts)

Bash(git -C "C:\\Users\\ncrim\\Documents\\GitHub\\SecondSetCombo-Wapp-Signer\\secondset-mobile-signer" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: implement proper Feldman VSS distributed key generation

- Fix DKG protocol: participants now exchange secret shares via
  coordinator WebSocket, all arriving at the same combined public key
  while each holding a unique key share \(2-of-3 threshold\)
- Fix @noble/secp256k1 v3 compatibility \(randomSecretKey API change\)
- Add crypto.getRandomValues polyfill via expo-crypto for React Native
- Fix EXPO_PUBLIC_ env var prefix for coordinator URL
- Fix coordinator returning localhost in WebSocket URLs \(now uses
  req.headers.host\)
- Fix device_id UUID mismatch \(was sending public key as device_id\)
- Fix @noble/hashes import path to use .js extension

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
